hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qi 'changelog'; then jq -n '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Commit complete. Update docs/changelog.md with an entry for this commit. Use git log -1 to get the message. Do not commit changelog.md — it will be included in the next commit."}}'; fi
